jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Cuemath
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
